comment: Drop-in for /etc/docker/daemon.json to keep Docker OFF the cluster's red
network range. Per UofT CS support, Docker's default bridge subnet
conflicts with the red range and causes unpredictable failures. These
address pools confine every bridge network Docker creates to the reserved
the docker daemon; restart dockerd after installing. If you have no admin
rights, use the per-network approach in run_docker_ollama.sh instead.
Remove this 'comment' key before use — daemon.json does not allow comments.
